name: Load and Run a Robot Simulation
description: CoppeliaSim is open with an empty scene. Load the pick-and-place demo scene (/opt/CoppeliaSim/scenes/pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt) using the ZMQ Remote API (client located at /opt/CoppeliaSim/programming/zmqRemoteApi/clients/python/src). Capture a screenshot of the simulation after it has been running for at least 5 seconds and save it to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/simulation_running.png.
